name: checkout-pro
description: Monorepo do Check-out PRO — gestão inteligente de supermercado (backend NestJS + app móvel Expo).

scripts.verify:backend: npm run build --workspace=@checkout-pro/backend && npm run test --workspace=@checkout-pro/backend
scripts.verify:mobile: npm run type-check --workspace=@checkout-pro/mobile && npm run lint --workspace=@checkout-pro/mobile && npm run test --workspace=@checkout-pro/mobile
scripts.verify: npm run verify:backend && npm run verify:mobile
